CertificateArn.markdownDescription:
The certificate Arn

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-us-gov):dms:[\w-]+:[0-9]+:cert:[A-Z0-9]+  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
